dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: Stand still 3s — Incoming Damage -5%. Stacks 3 times. Removed on move.

dbName: Ebonfang Rapier of the Thayan Zealot

dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: While in Thay, Movement Speed +10%. Every 3s in combat, gain Umbral Stride stack: General +0.25% Power, DPS +0.5% Critical Severity, Healer +0.3% Overall Outgoing Healing, Tank +0.4% Awareness. Max 10 stacks.
2 of Set: While in Thay, Movement Speed +10%. 10% chance on encounter power to gain 5% Critical Severity for 6s.
2 of Set: Gain 7.5% Power while at full health. Decreases relative to missing health. Role bonus: DPS +2.5% CA, Tank +2.5% Defense, Healer +2.5% OH. Fire maps double role bonus + 10% Movement Speed.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Pilgrim (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: At the start of combat, your Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing are increased by 1% for every enemy you faced when starting combat, to a max of 10% for 10s. If facing only one enemy at start, the bonus is +5% for 1 minute. When you kill an enemy, this buff will refresh.

2 of Set: Increased stat per party member: Party 1 = +200 Power; Party 2-5 progressively adds Defense/Accuracy/CS/CritSev.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Primal (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: If you are hit or healed for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, your Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing are increased by 10% for 10 seconds.

2 of Set: Start of combat: BDB, OOH, Damage Resistance +1%. Every 5s in combat: +1%. Doubled by Trophy Hunter buff. (Max 10%)
2 of Set: Fey-Touched on encounter power: 10% AP + 3% BDB + 6% OOH for 10s. (30s CD)
2 of Set: Start of combat: BDB and OOH +1% per enemy faced. If facing only 1 enemy, BDB and OOH +3% for 1 minute.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Hellfire Engine Remains (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: At the start of combat, your Stamina Regeneration is increased by 15% and your Movement Speed is increased by 15% for 10 seconds. When you kill an enemy, this buff will refresh. When you leave combat, this buff will expire.

dbName: Honed Tip of the Blessed Blade

dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: Sure Edge of the Blessed Blade. Encounter power triggers Blessed: +3% Power/Accuracy/CA + random buff (Blessed Guidance +5% CritStrike or Blessed Insight +7.5% AP gain) for 10s. (30s CD)

dbName: Honed Tip of the Blessed Blade

dbEquipBonuses.name: Blessed Blade (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: When you use an encounter power, your weapons become Blessed, increasing your Power, Accuracy, and Combat Advantage by 3% and granting buffs for 10 seconds: Blessed Guidance (+5% Critical Strike), Blessed Might (+7.5% Action Point gain). Your weapons can only be Blessed once every 30 seconds.
2 of Set: Dodge/block/sprint/shadow slip Movement Speed +30% for 2s. (10s CD)
2 of Set: While in Thay, Movement Speed +14%, Forte +3%. Whenever you use an encounter power, 15% chance to gain 10% Critical Severity for 6s.
2 of Set: Encounter triggers Fortified: Defense +5%, 10% of Defense added to Power for 10s. (30s CD)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Meteoric Fury (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: Deal or heal up to 5% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and the target. Role bonus: DPS +2% Base Damage Boost, Tank -4% Incoming Damage, Healer +6% Overall Outgoing Healing. Does not stack. When in Wildspace, role bonus is doubled and Movement Speed is increased by 10%.
2 of Set: Encounter triggers Master of Illusion (10s): illusion attacks enemies, +3% damage. (30s CD)
